node.html:
About

I am a student pursuing an undergraduate degree in PESIT Bangalore, majoring in Computer Science and Engineering.

Work

I have previously worked at Reap Benefit and Paisool (INBE)

Research

Semantic Segmentation of Eyes Regions

Developed a segmentation model for the Open Eye Dataset released by Facebook, under the guidance of Prof Gowri Srinivasa. Our CNN model achieved a better mIoU score than the baseline submission by the Facebook OpenEDS team. The paper has been submitted to CVPR 2020.

Evaluating Trends in Software Development in Open-Source projects

Presently working on analyzing the software development metrics of open source projects under the guidance of Prof Subhajt Datta, Singapore University of Technology and Desig

Re-establishing communication in disaster-struck areas with drones

Ideated and demonstrated a drone network to set up communication channels in the aftermath of a natural disaster. Our project was a finalist at IEEE CCEM Student PoC and presented at the IEEE Drone Conference 2018.
